title: papaver dubium var. lamottei
intro: Papaver dubium var. lamottei, also known as the Yellow Poppy or Pyramidal Poppy, is a flowering plant species in the poppy family. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its alkaloid content, including papaverine, which has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Papaver dubium var. lamottei include its potential use in reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and acting as a sedative. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, with some practitioners also using it in infusions or salves to harness its medicinal properties.
